package rulecoverage

func NegativeBindjsonIntoMapAnyHotEndpoint() string {
    ruleID := "bindjson_into_map_any_hot_endpoint"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Gin handlers that bind JSON into map[string]any or map[string]interface{} on hot request paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
